name: silent-spec
description: Auto-generates unit tests on file save using AI — silent, surgical, zero friction

untrustedWorkspaces.description: Automatic test generation and TypeScript compilation checks require a trusted workspace. In untrusted workspaces, generation is disabled.

commands.title: SilentSpec: Find Gaps in Current File
SilentSpec: Generate Tests for Current File

silentspec.enabled.description: Enable or disable SilentSpec auto test generation

silentspec.supportedExtensions.description: List of file extensions that SilentSpec will generate tests for

enumDescriptions: Free local generation via Ollama — no API key needed
Claude (Anthropic) — best quality, requires API key
GitHub Models — free tier, requires GitHub Personal Access Token
silentspec.provider.description: AI provider for test generation. Use 'ollama' for free local generation.

silentspec.model.description: Model override. Leave empty for provider default.
silentspec.model.markdownDescription: Leave empty to use defaults: `deepseek-coder:6.7b` (Ollama) / `claude-sonnet-4-6` (Claude) / `gpt-4o` (OpenAI) / `gpt-4o` (GitHub Models)

silentspec.openSpecOnCreate.description: Open the generated spec file in a split panel when first created.

silentspec.aiTimeoutSeconds.description: Timeout in seconds for AI provider calls. Increase for slow connections.

silentspec.maxFunctionsPerRun.description: Hard cap on functions per AI call. Adaptive logic auto-reduces to 5 for files >12k chars (important for GitHub Models free tier). Set to 3-5 for free-tier providers, 8 for paid APIs.

scripts.compile: npm run check-types && npm run lint && node esbuild.js
scripts.package: npm run check-types && npm run lint && node esbuild.js --production
scripts.pretest: npm run compile-tests && npm run compile && npm run lint
